description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun with a matte black finish, featuring a skeletonized stock and a detachable curved magazine. The receiver is robust and streamlined, with a prominent charging handle and a top-mounted accessory rail for optics. The handguard is short and fitted with a vertical foregrip for improved control during rapid fire. The barrel is relatively short and ends flush with the handguard, lacking any visible muzzle device. The fire selector and trigger assembly are clearly defined, with ergonomic contours for comfortable handling. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a skeletonized stock, curved magazine, and vertical foregrip, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, curved magazine, vertical foregrip, and top accessory rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, vertical foregrip, and narrow profile of the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, fire selector, and ergonomic grip, mirroring the main features of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open structure of the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
